The Man Behind the Sound

About Us

Based in the sacred city of Vrindavan, Keshav Sound Service has been the trusted name for devotional event audio across Braj Bhoomi.

We specialize in large-format professional audio — Yamaha mixing consoles, high-powered P-Series PA systems, and professional microphones — ensuring every syllable of the katha reaches every devotee's heart.

We understand the sanctity of devotional events. We set up quietly, serve devotedly, and deliver sound that elevates the spiritual experience.

🎚️ Laxman Sharma Ji
Founder & Chief Sound Engineer · Vrindavan
📞 +91 76685 11013 📞 +91 94128 01705
